$comment: Project calibration of the agent-pipeline repo ITSELF (self-application E13/ADR-0015, A12 mechanism). Keys starting with '$' are documentation. Denies do NOT live here (E8/E11): this repo relies on the git-guard union shipped by its own plugin.
$verify: THE one gate command (E5) of this docs+guardrails repo: the verify wrapper (harness/scripts/verify.mjs, AC-G4-2) runs the full guard-family test set (guard-git.test.mjs: 1 block + 1 allow case per deny rule, quote-stripping, segment scoping, guard-config, override, global-option-normalization cases; guard-testpath.test.mjs: test-path PreToolUse guard cases) and writes a machine-generated JSON evidence artifact (evidence/verify-latest.json, schema pipeline.verify-evidence.v0, git-ignored — QG-03).

ritualExtensions.$comment: Real A12 extension (not fictional): close.pre runs the CLAUDE.md length gate before every close of this repo.
